Notes: Single UPDATE adds the same RRset member twice with identical owner/type/RDATA but different TTLs; follow-up QUERY observes which TTL, if any, is retained.

Steps.Description: Add the same A RR twice for host.campus.edu. with conflicting TTLs in one UPDATE.

Steps.Name: host.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset exists and whether the server normalized or rejected the conflicting TTL update.
